calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-13-2026 Continued To Jul-22-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Allen Lovejoy appeared in person (petitioner).

The Court suggested additional investigation should be required if the decedent was adopted not only by petitioner's uncle Joseph Dilly, but also by Wanda Heer listed as the decedents mother on his birth certificate issued after his adoption. The Court also stated that the petitioner is to give notice to the Attorney General pursuant to section 8111, including the peition and all supplemental papers.

The matter is continued to July 23, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-21-2026 Continued To May-13-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
